prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5597名→4761名→4070名→3267名→3332名，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约2265名；但2 025年较2024年小幅后移65名，出现企稳信号。2025年基准位次约3332名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年20人、2022年15人、2023年20人、2024年15人、2 025年12人，呈波动下降趋势；2026年计划仅8人，较2025年缩招33.3%，为近年最大降幅。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，对位次有前移（更易进）的拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享哈尔滨工业大学品牌。软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学（本部）2026年位列第12名（Top20），威 海校区作为哈工大重要组成部分，办学层次与本部一致，属国内顶尖工科院校梯队；哈工大（本部）2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情事 件；抖音学校热度总排名第10位（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续升温。威海校区虽无独立声誉数据，但共享哈工大整体品牌形象，国防七子、硬核工科的标签对 考生有较强吸引力。历史投档异常数据中未见哈工大（威海）断档记录；哈尔滨工业大学（本部）第五轮学科评估中拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A等17个A类学科。威海校区招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类、机器人工程、电气工程等） 均对应上述A类学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐 ）等与该校招生专业高度匹配的专业大类持续高热，报考意愿强烈。北京市2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加 剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的大趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩招33.3%（拉动位次前移）、北京市考生总数大幅增长29.7% （加剧竞争，拉动位次后移）、学校985/211顶尖层次及抖音高热关注度（吸引更多高分考生报考）等多重因素，缩招与考生大增形成对冲。，考 虑考生规模激增和学校高热度的竞争加剧效应，适度上调位次。预测2026年最低录取位次约2716名，区间2390–3042名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（山东）（未来信息）：含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、自动化、通信工程、电子信息工程、集成电路设计与集成系统、光电信息科学与工程、电气 工程及其自动化
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（山东）（未来智造拔尖班）：含机器人工程、智能制造工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、材料科学与工程、电气工程及其自动化、精密仪器、测控技术与仪器、储能 科学与工程等
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次2716名处于区间2390–3042名中部。位次优于区间上限（3042名以上）可重点冲刺一档未来信息专业（计算机/人工智能/通信方向，学科评估A类、社会热度高热推荐）；位次在区间内建议以未来信息为主、未来智造拔尖班保底；位次低于区间下限（2390名以下）则两专业均有较大把握。未来智造拔尖班虽含部分传统工科方向，但机器人工程、 智能制造等新兴方向前景良好，且第三四年可至校本部培养。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 5597 → 4761 → 4070 → 3267 → 3332, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 2265 over the past 4 years; however, in 2025, there was a slight backward shift of 65 compared to 2024, indicating a stabilization signal. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3332. The enrollment plan for Beijing comprehensive subjects was 20 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a fluctuating downward trend; the 2026 plan is only 8, a 33.3% reduction from 2025, the largest decrease in recent years. A reduction in enrollment means fewer competitive slots, which has a pulling effect on rankings moving forward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing the brand of Harbin Institute of Technology. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th (Top 20) in 2026. The Weihai campus, as an important component of HIT, has the same academic level as the main campus and belongs to the top tier of domestic engineering universities. The reputation evaluation of HIT (main campus) during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. The overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from examinees. Although the Weihai campus has no independent reputation data, it shares the overall brand image of HIT, and the labels of 'National Defense Seven Sons' and 'Hardcore Engineering' strongly attract examinees. No record of admission gaps for HIT (Weihai) was found in historical abnormal admission data. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, HIT (main campus) has 17 A-class disciplines, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, and Software Engineering A. The majors offered at the Weihai campus (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Robotics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.) all correspond to the above A-class disciplines, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that major categories such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), which highly match the majors offered by this university, continue to be highly popular, with strong application willingness. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Beijing in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, indicating a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the overall trend of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by 33.3% (pulling rankings forward), the substantial increase in Beijing candidates by 29.7% (intensifying competition, pulling rankings backward), and the top-tier 985/211 level and high Douyin popularity of the university (attracting more high-scoring candidates), the reduction in enrollment and the surge in candidates offset each other. Considering the intensified competition due to the surge in candidates and high university popularity, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 2716, with a range of 2390–3042.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Shandong) (Future Information): Includes Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Shandong) (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class): Includes Robotics Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Design and Automation, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Precision Instruments, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Energy Storage Science and Engineering, etc.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 2716 is in the middle of the range 2390–3042. Candidates with rankings better than the upper limit (above 3042) can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 Future Information major (Computer/AI/Communication direction, A-class discipline evaluation, high social popularity recommendation); candidates within the range are advised to prioritize Future Information with Future Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class as a backup; candidates with rankings below the lower limit (below 2390) have a high probability of entering both majors. Although the Future Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class includes some traditional engineering directions, emerging directions such as Robotics Engineering and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering have good prospects, and students can transfer to the main campus for training in the third and fourth years.
